sources.title: X Thread — AI Agent Frameworks W12
sources.summary: 7-tweet thread covering LangGraph vs CrewAI vs AutoGen convergence, NVIDIA AgentIQ launch, deployment patterns shifting to hybrid local/cloud.

sources.title: X Post — Agent Deployment Patterns
sources.summary: Single tweet on the shift from cloud-only to hybrid deployment for AI agents.

sources.title: AI Agent Frameworks Comparison 2025-2026
sources.summary: Shakudo's ranking of top 9 frameworks: LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, Semantic Kernel, etc. Good for positioning takes.

sources.title: X Post — W12 Recap Teaser
sources.summary: Teaser post for the W12 thread.

sources.title: Enterprise AI Agents Hitting a Wall
sources.summary: IBM's 2026 predictions: agent identity management, governance as board-level concern, scaling challenges.

sources.title: Google Agent2Agent (A2A) Protocol Launch
sources.summary: Google introduces A2A, an open protocol for AI agent interoperability. 50+ partners including Salesforce, SAP, ServiceNow. Game-changer for multi-vendor agent ecosystems.

sources.title: Anthropic Claude Agent SDK Open Source
sources.summary: Anthropic open-sources Agent SDK with tool use, guardrails, multi-agent orchestration. Reference implementations included.

sources.title: Microsoft AutoGen v0.5 — Multi-Agent Patterns
sources.summary: AutoGen v0.5 ships declarative agent graphs, improved memory, native MCP support. Enterprise-grade reliability focus.

sources.title: OpenAI Agents SDK — 10K Stars in First Week
sources.summary: OpenAI's open-source Agents SDK rapid adoption. Handoffs, guardrails, tracing, MCP integration. Community building custom frameworks on top.

sources.title: LangGraph Cloud GA — Managed Agent Deployment
sources.summary: LangGraph Cloud reaches GA with persistence, human-in-the-loop, streaming. Managed platform for stateful agents.

sources.title: Gartner: 40% Enterprise Agent Adoption by EOY 2026
sources.summary: Gartner predicts 40% enterprise AI agent adoption. Governance and identity management top barriers. Start single-domain before multi-agent.

sources.title: McKinsey: AI Agents — $2.6T Productivity Unlock
sources.summary: McKinsey estimates $2.6T annual productivity gains by 2028. Key sectors: financial services, healthcare, software development.

sources.title: Agent Observability: LangSmith vs Arize vs Langfuse
sources.summary: Agent observability as the new DevOps. Comparison of LangSmith, Arize Phoenix, Langfuse for tracing and monitoring multi-agent systems.

sources.title: Deloitte: AI Agent Governance Frameworks
sources.summary: Comprehensive governance framework: identity, access control, audit trails, liability in multi-agent enterprise deployments.

sources.title: AWS Bedrock Agent Blueprints — Pre-built Enterprise Patterns
sources.summary: 15 pre-built agent blueprints for enterprise: customer service, doc processing, code review, data analysis. Native guardrails.

w13_themes: SDK wars: Anthropic vs OpenAI vs Microsoft — every major lab now has an agent SDK
Google A2A protocol — interoperability as the next battleground
Enterprise readiness: Gartner 40%, McKinsey $2.6T, but governance gap is real
Agent observability emerging as critical infra layer
LangGraph Cloud GA — managed vs self-hosted agent deployment
